sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105443" key="trixo/foitos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐχό-φοιτος</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἴουλος,</foreign> prob. the first down of youth <sense id="n105443.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">just passing into hair,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.10</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Strat.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
